goal: Use registry-backed truth to unload disabled repo runtimes immediately, perform daemon-wide idle detection with graceful auto-shutdown, and avoid unnecessary daemon wakeups by consulting registry hints first in extension startup/tool gating paths.
summary: Implemented disable-triggered runtime/job unloading, daemon-wide idle auto-shutdown with socket/pid cleanup, and registry-first extension gating that avoids waking the daemon for disabled or never-enabled repos. Added deterministic coverage for idle shutdown/restart, disabled-runtime behavior, and no-wakeup gating.
